	orl A, R0

	mov A, @R0

org	29C6h
	cjne R7, #01h, jump_29D7	;   1

org	29C9h
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E3

org	29CCh
	movx A, @DPTR

org	29CDh
	orl A, #40h	;  64 '@'

org	29CFh
	movx @DPTR, A

org	29D0h
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E9

org	29D3h
	mov A, #06h	;   6

org	29D5h
	movx @DPTR, A

org	29D6h
	ret

jump_29D7:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_01B8
; overlapping 2 byte(s)

org	29D8h
fwd_29D8_jump_28B9:
	ajmp jump_28B9


org	29DAh
	mov A, #01h	;   1

org	29DCh
	movx @DPTR, A

org	29DDh
	mov DPTR, #dptr_01B7

org	29E0h
	mov A, #08h	;   8

org	29E2h
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_29E3:
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	mov A, #6Fh	; 111 'o'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0526
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0BFh	; 191  -65 '¿'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E9
	mov A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_810A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_06A8
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_810A
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0C0h	; 192  -64 'À'
	jnz jump_2A17
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FEh	; 254   -2 'þ'
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	ljmp jump_47A5

jump_2A17:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_810A
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnb 0E0h.6, jump_2A40
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E6
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jnz jump_2A47
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E5
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0Fh	;  15
	xrl A, #02h	;   2
	jz jump_2A3B
	acall jump_2A4A
	sjmp jump_2A47

jump_2A3B:
	lcall jump_4E3C
	sjmp jump_2A47

jump_2A40:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FEh	; 254   -2 'þ'
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_2A47:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_810A
jump_2A4A:
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	jnb 0E0h.7, jump_2A65
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #02h	;   2
	lcall jump_4EEA
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0156
	mov A, #05h	;   5
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E3
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

jump_2A65:
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_041C
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_2A84
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8002
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	clr A
	mov R5, A
	lcall jump_49F8
	mov 4Eh, R6
	mov 4Fh, R7
	mov DPTR, #dptr_041E
	mov A, #20h	;  32 ' '
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_2A84:
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_80A2
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jz jump_2A8F
	ajmp fwd_2AFA_jump_2AFE

jump_2A8F:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E6
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_2A97
	ajmp fwd_2AFA_jump_2AFE

jump_2A97:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E5
	movx A, @DPTR
	swap A
	anl A, #0Fh	;  15
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jnz jump_2AC4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_06AA
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80ED
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #jump_06A9
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EC
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	jnz jump_2ABF
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EC
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R6, A
	mov R7, A
	sjmp jump_2ABF

jump_2ABF:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80ED
	mov A, R7
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_2AC4:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E4
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EF
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80F1
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0557
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0156
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_013B
	mov A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl A, #0EFh	; 239  -17 'ï'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E5
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	swap A
	anl A, #0Fh	;  15
	add A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	jnc jump_2AFC
fwd_2AFA_jump_2AFE:
	sjmp jump_2AFE

jump_2AFC:
	acall fwd_29D8_jump_28B9
jump_2AFE:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E4
	movx A, @DPTR
	rrc A
	rrc A
	rrc A
	anl A, #1Fh	;  31
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_2B1A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EC
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, 07h, jump_2B1A
	lcall jump_6749
	lcall jump_4D9E
jump_2B1A:
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E3
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	rrc A
	rrc A
	anl A, #3Fh	;  63 '?'
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_2B38
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	jnz jump_2B78
	sjmp jump_2B75

jump_2B38:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EF
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EA
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0EFh	; 239  -17 'ï'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EF
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	cjne A, #01h, jump_2B4F	;   1
	sjmp jump_2B53

jump_2B4F:
	mov A, R7
	cjne A, #02h, jump_2B59	;   2
jump_2B53:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0557
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_2B59:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80F7
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80EF
	movx A, @DPTR
	setb C
	subb A, R7
	jc jump_2B75
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80A2
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #01h, jump_2B78	;   1
	mov DPTR, #dptr_80E4
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

jump_2B75:
	lcall jump_47A5
jump_2B78:
	ret

	clr A
	mov R6, A
	mov A, R7
	clr C
	rrc A
	mov R5, A
	mov A, R7
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_2B87
	mov A, R6
	add A, #80h	; 128 -128
	mov R6, A
jump_2B87:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FD0F
	mov A, R5
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R7, 06h
	ret

	mov R3, 07h
	mov R2, 06h
	mov A, R5
	add A, R3
	mov R3, A
	clr A
	addc A, R2
	mov R2, A
	clr C
	mov DPTR, #dptr_809F
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, R3
	mov DPTR, #dptr_809E
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, R2
	jnc jump_2BB9
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	add A, #01h	;   1
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_809E
	movx A, @DPTR
	addc A, #00h	;   0
	mov R6, A
	clr C
	mov A, R3
	subb A, R7
	mov R3, A
	mov A, R2
	subb A, R6
	mov R2, A
jump_2BB9:
	mov A, R2
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FD10
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R7, 03h
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	add A, R7
	mov 82h, A
	clr A
	addc A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	mov 83h, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	ret

	nop
	reti

	inc R0

end
